case_title: FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. vs. CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/17/97 $2,284.49 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,899.49, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG DOES I TO V SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. SERVED NOV-25-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ENT- ORIGINAL WRITTEN CONTRACT/LEASE, 3-DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, YUNENG AKA NENG-YU, CHANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1425 FILLMORE ST #511, LEASE FORFEITED
